thread.title: Texas board approves Bible curriculum in public schools
thread.title_full: Texas board approves Bible curriculum in public schools

author: ABC News
title: Texas board approves Bible curriculum in public schools
text: The Texas Board of Education approved a new K-5 curriculum that implements Bible teachings in classrooms.
